children.label: A
children.text: a national tribal sex offender registry; and

children.label: B
children.text: a tribal protection order registry containing civil and criminal orders of protection issued by Indian tribes and participating jurisdictions.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: 2 Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $1,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2014 through 2018, to remain available until expended.
